description: Golden set for the deterministic sensitive-topic classifier (app.escalation.classify_sensitive). This is the code-level safety net that force-escalates sensitive questions regardless of the model. Two kinds of case: `sensitive` (must classify to the given category) and `benign` (must return null). The `trap` cases are benign questions that contain a sensitive keyword as a SUBSTRING ('will' contains 'ill', 'licensed' contains 'lice') — they guard against the substring-matching false positives that mis-escalated real questions. No LLM: this runs in milliseconds and is fully deterministic.

cases.text: My child has a fever, can she come in?
She feels feverish this morning
My son is ill today
She's had an illness all week
He keeps coughing, is that okay?
My daughter threw up last night
Can you give my child medication during the day?
What is your tylenol dosage policy?
My child has a peanut allergy
She has several food allergies
He is at risk of anaphylaxis
My child fell and hit their head
She took a bad fall on the playground
There was an injury, she's bleeding
I want to dispute a charge on my invoice
You overcharged me last month
My ex is not allowed to pick up my child
There is a court order about custody
what will be for lunch tomorrow?
Is the daycare licensed?
My fellow parents recommended you
Can I get a refill on the water bottle?
Do you offer a still-life art class?
What skills will my child develop here?
Do the older kids influence the younger ones?
What are your hours?
How much is infant tuition?
Can I book a tour for next Tuesday?
What's for lunch today?
